title: diospyros ferrea var. neilgerrensis
intro: Diospyros ferrea var. neilgerrensis is a variant of the Diospyros ferrea tree, a species of evergreen tree in the family Ebenaceae, native to the Western Ghats of India. The tree has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Diospyros ferrea var. neilgerrensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against gastrointestinal disorders. In herbal preparations, the bark and roots of the tree are often dried and powdered, then used in traditional remedies such as decoctions, infusions, and ointments.
